stage05_route_key: string (optional, preferred route key for Stage 05 local image generation)
comfyui_workflow_mapping_key: string (optional, preferred workflow_node_mapping key selected for this Stage 05 route)
comfyui_workflow_name: string (optional, current underlying workflow target name used by the selected mapping key)
comfyui_model_id: string (optional, current model candidate id selected for this Stage 05 route)
preferred_comfyui_workflow_candidate: string (optional, preferred community or official workflow candidate recorded by the route registry)
preferred_comfyui_model_candidate: string (optional, preferred model candidate recorded by the route registry)
route_migration_state: string (optional, indicates whether the current route is transitional, ready_to_import, or still a research gap)
preferred_comfyui_workflow_source_ref: string (optional, source URL or path for the preferred workflow candidate)
preferred_comfyui_workflow_format: string (optional, for example api_workflow or ui_graph)
comfyui_style_preset_key: string (optional, route-internal style preset key selected from the Stage 05 route registry)
comfyui_style_preset_label: string (optional, human-readable label for the selected route-internal style preset)
comfyui_style_positive_anchor: string (optional, positive style anchor text patched into workflow nodes when supported)
comfyui_style_negative_anchor: string (optional, negative style anchor text patched into workflow nodes when supported)
comfyui_control_mode: string (optional, current local control strategy such as prompt_only or reference_guided)
comfyui_optimization_profile: string (optional, selected local speed-quality optimization profile such as preview, balanced, or quality)
comfyui_optimization_profile_label: string (optional, human-readable label for the selected local optimization profile)
preferred_comfyui_workflow_import_blocke: string (optional reasons the preferred workflow is not yet directly executable)

jobs.stage05_route_key: string (optional, should match top-level route key when present)
jobs.comfyui_workflow_mapping_key: string (optional, should match top-level mapping key when present)
jobs.comfyui_workflow_name: string (optional, current underlying workflow target name for this job)
jobs.comfyui_model_id: string (optional, should match top-level model id when present)
jobs.preferred_comfyui_workflow_candidate: string (optional, should match top-level preferred workflow candidate when present)
jobs.preferred_comfyui_model_candidate: string (optional, should match top-level preferred model candidate when present)
jobs.route_migration_state: string (optional, should match top-level route migration state when present)
jobs.preferred_comfyui_workflow_source_ref: string (optional, should match top-level preferred workflow source ref when present)
jobs.preferred_comfyui_workflow_format: string (optional, should match top-level preferred workflow format when present)
jobs.comfyui_style_preset_key: string (optional, should match top-level style preset key when present)
jobs.comfyui_style_preset_label: string (optional, should match top-level style preset label when present)
jobs.comfyui_style_positive_anchor: string (optional, should match top-level positive style anchor when present)
jobs.comfyui_style_negative_anchor: string (optional, should match top-level negative style anchor when present)
jobs.comfyui_control_mode: string (optional, should match top-level control mode when present)
jobs.comfyui_optimization_profile: string (optional, should match top-level optimization profile when present)
jobs.comfyui_optimization_profile_label: string (optional, should match top-level optimization profile label when present)
preferred_comfyui_workflow_custom_node_d: string (optional, should match top-level dependency list when present)
preferred_comfyui_workflow_import_blocke: string (optional, should match top-level import blocker list when present)
